piccita adj. breitgedrückt, gequetscht  SUŚR. 1,182,17 . 301,7 . 361,18 . prahārapīḍanābhyāṃ tu yadaṅgaṃ pṛthutāṃ gatam . sāsthi tatpiccitaṃ vidyānmajjaraktapariplutam .. 2,19,4 .
